product: AI-accelerated genomic variant calling and disease prediction platform
primary_challenge: Parabricks pipeline on GKE with HIPAA Confidential VM controls. IAM permission gaps on GPU node pool.
deployment_target: hybrid - GKE cloud + on-premise hospital nodes
twelve_month_goal: Deploy variant calling pipeline across 5 genomics labs with sub-hour turnaround on whole genome sequencing
investor_narrative: Reducing WGS analysis from 72 hours to under 1 hour unlocks clinical-grade genomics at population scale
